title: Chapter 1 Theory Brief - Flow, Onboarding, and Exit Intent
summary: Chapter-level guidance for Ada's opening chapter: inhabitable onboarding, subtle anomaly introduction, procedural grounding, pattern teaser, and a decision-based exit into pursuit.

narrative.notes: Chapter 1 mission: settle the reader into Ada's life and mind, deliver quiet atmosphere and competence rewards, introduce subtle wrongness, then end on a private commitment that turns routine into pursuit. This theory is leaning by design and should be updated if prose drafting discovers a cleaner sequence or stronger terminal beat.

rewardTokens.description: Warm, legible onboarding creates pleasure of entry before stronger wrongness arrives.
Ada's disciplined testing turns intrigue into trust.
The chapter exits on voluntary pursuit rather than passive unease.
